name: Education Policy
student_summary: Shape how India educates — NEP implementation, state reform, ed-research.
overview: Shape how India educates — NEP implementation, state reform, ed-research. Education Policy sits in the Education Systems family of Education & Training. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You enjoy breaking problems into parts and reasoning them through
You keep asking why until you reach the bottom of things
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply policy analysis to real problems
Collaborate with your team using program evaluation
Keep improving at stakeholder engagement — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Laboratories and research facilities with focused desk analysis
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: A broad Education Systems foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Education Policy is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of program evaluation
projects: Beginner: explore policy analysis with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Excel

rural_scope: Real rural relevance — this field serves or operates in rural India directly.

faqs: What does Education Policy pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹6 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹15 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Social Science, Economics. Typical degrees: Any degree + MPP/M.A. Education, Development studies. Alternatives exist: any degree + b.ed.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Education Policy evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Education Policy is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
